title: Mosasaur upclose and personal
caption: Mosasaur upclose and personal: a Mosasaurus snapping its jaws — rushing through open water. Photorealistic paleoart for posters and canvas prints.
description: Mosasaur upclose and personal — fine-art paleoart print of Mosasaurus snapping its jaws, rushing through open water. Museum-quality prehistoric wall art for collectors and natural-history enthusiasts.
